mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teacher ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM teacher WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (user_id, name, gender, phone, email, teacher_level, subject, title, hire_date, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{teacherLevel}, #{subject}, #{title}, #{hireDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET user_id=#{userId}, name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, teacher_level=#{teacherLevel}, subject=#{subject}, title=#{title}, hire_date=#{hireDate}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
